query: Can you create a one-week travel itinerary for two people departing from Myrtle Beach and covering three cities in Michigan between March 4th and March 10th, 2022? Our budget is set at $8,300. We would like to experience both French and American cuisines during our journey. We will require accommodations, though we have no specific house rules in mind.

plan.transportation: Flight F3623834, from Myrtle Beach to Detroit
plan.attraction: Detroit Institute of Arts; Detroit Historical Museum;
plan.accommodation: Cozy 1 bedroom in the heart of Fort Greene, Detroit

plan.attraction: Henry Ford Museum of American Innovation; Motown Museum;
plan.accommodation: Cozy 1 bedroom in the heart of Fort Greene, Detroit

plan.transportation: Flight F3654616, from Detroit to Lansing
plan.attraction: Impression 5 Science Center; Potter Park Zoo;
plan.accommodation: Brand New Amazing 1 Bedroom Best Location, Lansing

plan.attraction: Michigan History Center; R.E. Olds Transportation Museum;
plan.accommodation: Brand New Amazing 1 Bedroom Best Location, Lansing

plan.attraction: Kalamazoo Institute of Arts; Air Zoo Aerospace & Science Museum;
plan.accommodation: East 63rd street, Studio Serviced Apartment, Kalamazoo

plan.attraction: Kalamazoo Nature Center; Kalamazoo Institute of Arts;
plan.accommodation: East 63rd street, Studio Serviced Apartment, Kalamazoo

plan.transportation: Self-driving from Kalamazoo to Myrtle Beach
